SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-10-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PAYNE, LORETTA KAY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA $2,400.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,400.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
